review_findings.message: Workbench controls showed success even when operator event persistence failed.
Operator events without action, run_id, or cycle_id cannot be reliably ingested into run manifest or artifact ledger.
Workflow state ingestion must not return a failed result with partially applied manifest events or artifact entries.
Projection generation must not use stale run_result or run_evaluation when operator events were ingested.
Projection history input_path and projection_path must not read files outside docs/examples.
Snapshot ids must remain strings so history latest and URL lookup use the same identity type.

hardening_items.invariant: Operator controls cannot show success unless their event has been persisted.
hardening_items.regression_test: workbench controls do not show success when operator event persistence fails
hardening_items.verification: npm run check:process-hardening; npm run check:workbench:browser-events

hardening_items.invariant: Operator events must include action, run_id, and cycle_id before they can be persisted.
hardening_items.regression_test: workbench server rejects operator events without ownership fields

hardening_items.invariant: Operator event workflow-state application must be atomic: if manifest and artifact ledger targets disagree, neither side is mutated.
hardening_items.regression_test: workflow state apply fails closed before partial mutation on manifest and ledger mismatch
hardening_items.verification: node --test test/operator-events.test.js test/run-manifest.test.js test/artifact-ledger.test.js; npm run check:closeout

hardening_items.invariant: When operator_event_ledger is present, projection generation must derive run_result and run_evaluation from ingested workflow state.
hardening_items.regression_test: workbench projection ignores stale run result when operator events are present

hardening_items.invariant: Workbench projection history paths must be relative and confined to docs/examples.
hardening_items.regression_test: workbench server rejects projection history paths outside examples

hardening_items.invariant: Workbench snapshot ids must be strings that pass the safe snapshot id pattern.
hardening_items.regression_test: snapshot request validation rejects unsafe ids; workbench server rejects non-string workflow state snapshot ids
hardening_items.verification: node --test test/workbench-snapshots.test.js test/workbench-server.test.js; npm run check:closeout
